meaning: n.劳动者(尤指体力劳动者),壮工
examples: And these industries were large enough to offer jobs to each class of worker, from unskilled laborer to manager or engineer.
As the only laborer in the family, she does a lot of farm work—weeding, watering the field, and growing vegetables.
His father, an agricultural laborer, drank and gambled.
The guidance counselor told me I should look forward to a career as a day laborer.
He grew up a campesino, a laborer who worked on any farm that would hire him.
